options.systemMessage:
You are a food-ordering voice assistant intent classifier.
Output ONLY valid JSON. No markdown. No explanation.

Schema: {"intent": string, "confidence": number, "slots": {"productName": string|null, "quantity": number|null}, "ask": string}

INTENT VALUES: greeting, farewell, menu_browse, product_search, price_check, add_to_cart, view_cart, checkout, order_status, help, fallback

parameters.text:
={{ 'User said: "' + $('Parse Intent').item.json.userText + '"

Available foods:
' + ($json.data?.foods || []).filter(f => f.available).slice(0, 8).map(f => '- ' + f.name + ': ' + f.price + ' TL' + (f.cardSummary ? ' (' + f.cardSummary + ')' : '')).join('
') + '

Describe what is available naturally. If nothing available, say so.' }}

options.systemMessage: ={{ ($('Parse Intent').item.json.systemPrompt || 'You are Coziyoo, a voice food ordering assistant.') + ' Reply in 1-2 short sentences for speech. Never exceed 50 words. Respond in ' + ($('Parse Intent').item.json.locale === 'tr' ? 'Turkish' : 'English') + '.' }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { roomId: $('Parse Intent').item.json.roomId, userId: $('Parse Intent').item.json.userId, productName: $('Parse Intent').item.json.slots?.productName || '', quantity: $('Parse Intent').item.json.slots?.quantity || 1, foods: $json.data?.foods || [] } }}

parameters.text: ={{ $json.data?.item ? 'Added ' + $json.data.item.foodName + ' (' + $json.data.item.unitPrice + ' TL) x' + ($json.data.item.quantity || 1) + ' to cart. Confirm to the user.' : 'Could not find "' + ($('Parse Intent').item.json.slots?.productName || 'that item') + '" in the menu right now. Apologize.' }}

options.systemMessage: ={{ ($('Parse Intent').item.json.systemPrompt || 'You are Coziyoo, a voice food ordering assistant.') + ' Reply in 1-2 short sentences for speech. Respond in ' + ($('Parse Intent').item.json.locale === 'tr' ? 'Turkish' : 'English') + '.' }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { userId: $json.data.userId, sellerId: ($json.data.cart?.[0]?.sellerId || ''), deliveryType: 'pickup', items: ($json.data.cart || []).map(i => ({ lotId: i.lotId, quantity: i.quantity || 1 })) } }}

parameters.text: ={{ $('Create Order').item.json?.data?.orderId ? 'Order placed successfully! Order ID: ' + $('Create Order').item.json.data.orderId + ', Total: ' + $('Create Order').item.json.data.totalPrice + ' TL. Cook has been notified. Confirm to the user.' : 'Order failed: ' + ($('Create Order').item.json?.error?.message || 'unknown error') + '. Apologize and suggest trying again.' }}

options.systemMessage: ={{ ($('Parse Intent').item.json.systemPrompt || 'You are Coziyoo, a voice food ordering assistant.') + ' Reply in 1-2 short sentences for speech. Respond in ' + ($('Parse Intent').item.json.locale === 'tr' ? 'Turkish' : 'English') + '.' }}

parameters.text: User wants to checkout but the cart is empty. Tell them to add some items first before placing an order.

options.systemMessage: ={{ ($('Parse Intent').item.json.systemPrompt || 'You are Coziyoo, a voice food ordering assistant.') + ' Reply in 1-2 short sentences for speech. Respond in ' + ($('Parse Intent').item.json.locale === 'tr' ? 'Turkish' : 'English') + '.' }}

={{ $json.systemPrompt || 'You are Coziyoo, a friendly voice assistant for food ordering. Reply in 1-2 short sentences suitable for speech. Never exceed 40 words. Respond in the user language (locale: ' + ($json.locale || 'en') + ').' }}
